scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --prefix client && npm run lint:fix --prefix server
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix client && npm run test --prefix server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix client && npm run typecheck --prefix server
